author: Sergey Pekarchik
item.compactmod.paperblock.desc1: When the block falls, paper drops out
item.compactmod.paperblock.desc2: When burning, it turns into a Burnt Paper Block, but it may burn completely
item.compactmod.paperblock.desc3: A Burnt Paper Block, if not burning, attracts creepers within a 70-block radius
item.compactmod.paperblock.desc4: Bees fly away from the block within a 50-block radius
item.compactmod.paperblock.desc5: Nothing drops when a Burnt Paper Block is destroyed
item.compactmod.burnt_paper_block.desc1: Can be obtained by burning a Paper Block
item.compactmod.burnt_paper_block.desc2: If not burning, attracts creepers within a 70-block radius
item.compactmod.burnt_paper_block.desc3: Bees within a 50-block radius fly out of this zone
item.compactmod.burnt_paper_block.desc4: Nothing drops when the block is destroyed
item.compactmod.burnt_paper_block.desc5: The block cannot be harvested even with a Silk Touch-enchanted tool
